responses.response:
Based on the QPR and escrow data for Ozone Urbana, Vantis would have flagged this project in Q1 2021 — 8 quarters before the FIR was filed in Q3 2023.

Q1 2021 — AMBER. Escrow withdrawal velocity slowed 34% below expected rate. Auto-alert sent to Secretary.

Q2 2021 — RED. QPR filings becoming vague. Two new civil cases filed. Escalated to Member (Legal).

Q1 2022 — Default probability crossed 81%. 1,847 homebuyers flagged. Rs.927 crore of capital at risk. Show cause notice auto-drafted.

K-RERA had 8 full quarters — two full years — to intervene before the FIR. Every intervention window was open. Vantis kept it open.

Found 2 developers with 3 or more consecutive QPR defaults as of Q1 2026:

1. Ozone Group — 5 consecutive defaults (Q4 2021 to Q4 2022)
   Project: Ozone Urbana — 2,300 units
   Status: HIGH RISK — enforcement initiated

2. Skylark Constructions — 1 missed, 2 late in last 4 quarters
   Project: Skylark Arcadia — 156 units
   Status: CAUTION — show cause issued

Recommendation: Ozone Group requires immediate RRC review. Skylark Constructions requires inspection within 30 days.

Prestige Lakeside Habitat has a COMPLIANT status on Vantis.

✓ All 8 quarterly reports filed on time
✓ No pending complaints — 2 earlier complaints resolved
✓ No active court cases
✓ Registration valid until June 2027
✓ Full Vantis Certificate — verified across 5 databases

Prestige Group has a developer trust score of 91 out of 100.

I always recommend the full verified report before a final decision — it includes the Encumbrance Certificate from Kaveri and complete litigation history. Would you like to know more?

Top projects by homebuyer capital at risk — May 2026:

1. Ozone Urbana — Rs.927 crore
   1,847 homebuyers | Status: HIGH RISK
   Possession overdue by 4+ years

2. Skylark Arcadia — Rs.18.4 crore
   98 homebuyers | Status: CAUTION
   Possession due September 2026 — at risk of delay

3. Divya Villas — Rs.0 at risk
   18 homebuyers | Status: COMPLIANT
   On track for March 2026 delivery

Immediate action recommended for Ozone Urbana.

SHOW CAUSE NOTICE
Section 63 — Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act 2016

To,
M/s Ozone Group, Bengaluru

Registration: PRM/KA/RERA/1251/309/PR/170517/004521
Project: Ozone Urbana

WHEREAS you have failed to submit Quarterly Progress Reports for 5 consecutive quarters in violation of Section 11(1) of the RERA Act 2016 and Rule 15 of the Karnataka RERA Rules 2017.

WHEREAS the penalty under Section 63 is Rs.25,000 per day of default. Total penalty accrued: Rs.45,75,000.

YOU ARE HEREBY directed to show cause within 21 days as to why penalty proceedings should not be initiated.

By order of the Authority,
Karnataka Real Estate Regulatory Authority

ಡಿವ್ಯಾ ವಿಲ್ಲಾಸ್ ಯೋಜನೆಯ ಪ್ರಸ್ತುತ ಸ್ಥಿತಿ:

✓ ಸ್ಥಿತಿ: ಅನುಸರಣೀಯ (COMPLIANT)
✓ RERA ನೋಂದಣಿ ಮಾರ್ಚ್ 2026 ವರೆಗೆ ಮಾನ್ಯ
✓ 8 ತ್ರೈಮಾಸಿಕ ವರದಿಗಳಲ್ಲಿ 6 ಸಮಯಕ್ಕೆ ಸಲ್ಲಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ
✓ ಯಾವುದೇ ದೂರುಗಳಿಲ್ಲ
✓ ವಾಂಟಿಸ್ ಪ್ರಮಾಣಪತ್ರ: ಪೂರ್ಣ ಪರಿಶೀಲಿತ

ನಿಮ್ಮ ಆಸ್ತಿ ಸುರಕ್ಷಿತವಾಗಿದೆ.

fallback_govern: I can help you with project compliance, QPR analysis, risk assessment, and drafting regulatory notices. Try asking about a specific project, QPR defaults, or capital at risk.
fallback_public: I can help you check a project's status, understand your rights as a homebuyer, or guide you through filing a complaint. What would you like to know?
